gpt55_review_summary: APPROVED: no blocking findings; transactional put_many validation, string chunk-type normalization, and invalid filter rejection align with public model invariants.
scope: document_kv_cache.manifest InMemoryManifestStore validation and planner/materializer manifest tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_planner_materializer.py -q => 37 passed; git diff --check => clean; poetry run pytest tests/test_planner_materializer.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q => 82 passed; poetry run pytest -q => 976 passed; poetry build && poetry check && poetry install --dry-run => succeeded.
what_changed: Hardened InMemoryManifestStore validation for document manifests.
why: The public Cachet manifest store is the source of truth for arbitrary document KV-cache materialization, so it should reject invalid refs and lookup filters before downstream planning or serving handoff.
